chunks.text: Connect - EECS at Berkeley. Connect With Us. We have a strong tradition of collaboration across disciplinary and organizational boundaries, dedication to education and outreach, close ties to industry, and a supportive and inclusive culture.
chunks.question: What are the key characteristics of Berkeley EECS?
chunks.answer: Collaboration, education, industry ties, inclusive culture.

chunks.text: Contact Berkeley EECS. K-12 Outreach. Our faculty and students collaborate on a range of activities to engage with students from kindergarten through high school. EE alumnus Paul Jacobs at the opening of Jacobs Hall in 2015.
chunks.question: What does Berkeley EECS do for K-12 outreach?
chunks.answer: Faculty and students engage K-12 students.

chunks.text: Make a Gift to EECS. Your generous support can help to sustain and expand our programs to prepare tomorrow’s engineering leaders. Support Us. Cory Hall.
chunks.question: How can donations benefit Berkeley EECS?
chunks.answer: Sustain and expand programs for leaders.

chunks.text: Pay a Visit to EECS. We welcome you to come to Berkeley and visit us in EECS. You could plan to attend a seminar or colloquium or visit our admissions staff, and then take time to walk around the beautiful UC campus. Visit Us. View. Open Faculty Positions.
chunks.question: What activities can visitors do at Berkeley EECS?
chunks.answer: Attend seminars, visit admissions, tour campus.
